root_text.an5.178:1.2: api nu tumhehi diṭṭhaṁ vā sutaṁ vā:
root_text.an5.178:1.4: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā pāṇātipātā veramaṇihetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karontī’”ti?
root_text.an5.178:1.7: Mayāpi kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, neva diṭṭhaṁ na sutaṁ:
root_text.an5.178:1.9: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā pāṇātipātā veramaṇihetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karontī’ti.
root_text.an5.178:1.10: Api ca khvassa tatheva pāpakammaṁ pavedenti:
root_text.an5.178:1.11: ‘ayaṁ puriso itthiṁ vā purisaṁ vā jīvitā voropesīti.
root_text.an5.178:1.12: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā pāṇātipātahetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karonti.
root_text.an5.178:1.13: Api nu tumhehi evarūpaṁ diṭṭhaṁ vā sutaṁ vā’”ti?
root_text.an5.178:2.2: api nu tumhehi diṭṭhaṁ vā sutaṁ vā:
root_text.an5.178:2.4: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā adinnādānā veramaṇihetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karontī’”ti?
root_text.an5.178:2.7: Mayāpi kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, neva diṭṭhaṁ na sutaṁ:
root_text.an5.178:2.9: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā adinnādānā veramaṇihetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karontī’ti.
root_text.an5.178:2.10: Api ca khvassa tatheva pāpakammaṁ pavedenti:
root_text.an5.178:2.11: ‘ayaṁ puriso gāmā vā araññā vā adinnaṁ theyyasaṅkhātaṁ ādiyīti.
root_text.an5.178:2.12: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā adinnādānahetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karonti.
root_text.an5.178:2.13: Api nu tumhehi evarūpaṁ diṭṭhaṁ vā sutaṁ vā’”ti?
root_text.an5.178:3.2: api nu tumhehi diṭṭhaṁ vā sutaṁ vā:
root_text.an5.178:3.4: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇihetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karontī’”ti?
root_text.an5.178:3.7: Mayāpi kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, neva diṭṭhaṁ na sutaṁ:
root_text.an5.178:3.9: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇihetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karontī’ti.
root_text.an5.178:3.10: Api ca khvassa tatheva pāpakammaṁ pavedenti:
root_text.an5.178:3.12: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā kāmesumicchācārahetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karonti.
root_text.an5.178:3.13: Api nu tumhehi evarūpaṁ diṭṭhaṁ vā sutaṁ vā’”ti?
root_text.an5.178:4.2: api nu tumhehi diṭṭhaṁ vā sutaṁ vā:
root_text.an5.178:4.4: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā musāvādā veramaṇihetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karontī’”ti?
root_text.an5.178:4.7: Mayāpi kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, neva diṭṭhaṁ na sutaṁ:
root_text.an5.178:4.9: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā musāvādā veramaṇihetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karontī’ti.
root_text.an5.178:4.10: Api ca khvassa tatheva pāpakammaṁ pavedenti:
root_text.an5.178:4.11: ‘ayaṁ puriso gahapatissa vā gahapatiputtassa vā musāvādena atthaṁ pabhañjīti.
root_text.an5.178:4.12: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā musāvādahetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karonti.
root_text.an5.178:4.13: Api nu tumhehi evarūpaṁ diṭṭhaṁ vā sutaṁ vā’”ti?
root_text.an5.178:5.2: api nu tumhehi diṭṭhaṁ vā sutaṁ vā:
root_text.an5.178:5.4: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā veramaṇihetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karontī’”ti?
root_text.an5.178:5.7: Mayāpi kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, neva diṭṭhaṁ na sutaṁ:
root_text.an5.178:5.9: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā veramaṇihetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karontī’ti.
root_text.an5.178:5.10: Api ca khvassa tatheva pāpakammaṁ pavedenti:
root_text.an5.178:5.11: ‘ayaṁ puriso surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānaṁ anuyutto itthiṁ vā purisaṁ vā jīvitā voropesi;
root_text.an5.178:5.12: ayaṁ puriso surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānaṁ anuyutto gāmā vā araññā vā adinnaṁ theyyasaṅkhātaṁ ādiyi;
root_text.an5.178:5.13: ayaṁ puriso surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānaṁ anuyutto paritthīsu parakumārīsu cārittaṁ āpajji;
root_text.an5.178:5.14: ayaṁ puriso surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānaṁ anuyutto gahapatissa vā gahapatiputtassa vā musāvādena atthaṁ pabhañjīti.
root_text.an5.178:5.15: Tamenaṁ rājāno gahetvā surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānahetu hananti vā bandhanti vā pabbājenti vā yathāpaccayaṁ vā karonti.
root_text.an5.178:5.16: Api nu tumhehi evarūpaṁ diṭṭhaṁ vā sutaṁ vā’”ti?

translation_text.an5.178:1.2: Have you ever seen or heard
translation_text.an5.178:1.3: of a person who has given up killing living creatures,
translation_text.an5.178:1.4: and the kings have them arrested for that, and execute, imprison, or banish them, or do what the case requires?”
translation_text.an5.178:1.7: I too have never seen or heard of such a thing.
translation_text.an5.178:1.10: Rather, the kings are informed of someone’s bad deed:
translation_text.an5.178:1.11: ‘This person has murdered a man or a woman.’
translation_text.an5.178:1.12: The kings have them arrested for killing, and execute, imprison, or banish them, or do what the case requires.
translation_text.an5.178:1.13: Have you ever seen or heard of such a case?”
translation_text.an5.178:1.14: “Sir, we have seen it and heard of it, and we will hear of it again.”
translation_text.an5.178:2.2: Have you ever seen or heard
translation_text.an5.178:2.3: of a person who has given up stealing,
translation_text.an5.178:2.4: and the kings have them arrested for that …?”
translation_text.an5.178:2.7: I too have never seen or heard of such a thing.
translation_text.an5.178:2.10: Rather, the kings are informed of someone’s bad deed:
translation_text.an5.178:2.11: ‘This person took something from a village or wilderness, with the intention to commit theft.’
translation_text.an5.178:2.12: The kings have them arrested for stealing …
translation_text.an5.178:2.13: Have you ever seen or heard of such a case?”
translation_text.an5.178:2.14: “Sir, we have seen it and heard of it, and we will hear of it again.”
translation_text.an5.178:3.2: Have you ever seen or heard
translation_text.an5.178:3.3: of a person who has given up sexual misconduct,
translation_text.an5.178:3.4: and the kings have them arrested for that …?”
translation_text.an5.178:3.7: I too have never seen or heard of such a thing.
translation_text.an5.178:3.10: Rather, the kings are informed of someone’s bad deed:
translation_text.an5.178:3.11: ‘This person had sexual relations with women or maidens under someone else’s protection.’
translation_text.an5.178:3.12: The kings have them arrested for that …
translation_text.an5.178:3.13: Have you ever seen or heard of such a case?”
translation_text.an5.178:3.14: “Sir, we have seen it and heard of it, and we will hear of it again.”
translation_text.an5.178:4.2: Have you ever seen or heard
translation_text.an5.178:4.3: of a person who has given up lying,
translation_text.an5.178:4.4: and the kings have them arrested for that …?”
translation_text.an5.178:4.7: I too have never seen or heard of such a thing.
translation_text.an5.178:4.10: Rather, the kings are informed of someone’s bad deed:
translation_text.an5.178:4.11: ‘This person has ruined a householder or householder’s child by lying.’
translation_text.an5.178:4.12: The kings have them arrested for that …
translation_text.an5.178:4.13: Have you ever seen or heard of such a case?”
translation_text.an5.178:4.14: “Sir, we have seen it and heard of it, and we will hear of it again.”
translation_text.an5.178:5.2: Have you ever seen or heard
translation_text.an5.178:5.3: of a person who has given up beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants,
translation_text.an5.178:5.4: and the kings have them arrested for that, and execute, imprison, or banish them, or do what the case requires?”
translation_text.an5.178:5.7: I too have never seen or heard of such a thing.
translation_text.an5.178:5.10: Rather, the kings are informed of someone’s bad deed:
translation_text.an5.178:5.11: ‘While under the influence of beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants, this person murdered a woman or a man.
translation_text.an5.178:5.12: Or they stole something from a village or wilderness.
translation_text.an5.178:5.13: Or they had sexual relations with women or maidens under someone else’s protection.
translation_text.an5.178:5.14: Or they ruined a householder or householder’s child by lying.’
translation_text.an5.178:5.15: The kings have them arrested for being under the influence of beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants, and execute, imprison, or banish them, or do what the case requires.
translation_text.an5.178:5.16: Have you ever seen or heard of such a case?”
translation_text.an5.178:5.17: “Sir, we have seen it and heard of it, and we will hear of it again.”

variant_text.an5.178:1.3: paṭiviratoti → paṭivirato hotīti (bj); paṭivirato hoti (sya-all, km, pts1ed)
variant_text.an5.178:1.10: khvassa → khvāssa (bj, pts1ed) | tatheva pāpakammaṁ pavedenti → tatheva pāpakaṁ kammaṁ pavedayanti (bj); tadeva pāpakammaṁ pavedeti (sya-all, km)
